support.support_text:
If you need any help or have any questions, feel free to join the bnder support server by clicking the button below. You can also visit our help page at https://bnder.net/help . If you are a company or organisation we offer a free enterprise support with a dedicated support channel for you and your team. For more information, please contact us.

If you have not yet run the setup for this bot, please do so by using `/setup` command.

invite.invite_text:
يمكنك دعوتي إلى خادمك بهذا الرابط
{{link}}

no_permission:
You are missing permission **{{permission}}** to execute this command. A workspace permission manager can grant permission by using the **/permission grant <@{{user_id}}> {{permission}}** command or apply a set of permissions via "/permission preset".
-# Learn more about the [permissions system](<https://bnder.net/help/permissions>).

permission.granted_user: <@{{user_id}}> has been granted the permission **{{permission}}** for the global scope.
permission.granted_user_project: <@{{user_id}}> has been granted the permission **{{permission}}** for the project **{{project_name}}**.
permission.user_already_has_permission_global: <@{{user_id}}> already has the permission **{{permission}}** in the global scope.
permission.revoked_user: <@{{user_id}}> has been revoked the permission **{{permission}}** for the global scope.
permission.revoked_user_project: <@{{user_id}}> has been revoked the permission **{{permission}}** for the project **{{project_name}}**.
permission.invalid_preset: The preset **{{preset}}** is invalid. Please use one of the following: {{presets}}
permission.preset_used_user_project: The preset **{{preset}}** was applied to the user <@{{user_id}}> for the project **{{project_name}}**. The user now has the following permissions: {{permissions}}
permission.preset_used_user: The preset **{{preset}}** was applied to the user <@{{user_id}}> for the global scope. The user now has the following permissions: {{permissions}}
permission.one_target_required: اختر إما مستعمل أو فريق، وليس كلاهما.
permission.team_not_found: Team **{{team}}** was not found. Choose one of the autocomplete suggestions.
permission.granted_team: The team **{{team}}** was granted the permission **{{permission}}** for the global scope.
permission.granted_team_project: The team **{{team}}** was granted the permission **{{permission}}** for the project **{{project_name}}**.
permission.team_already_has_permission_global: The team **{{team}}** already has the permission **{{permission}}** in the global scope.
permission.team_already_has_permission_project: The team **{{team}}** already has the permission **{{permission}}** for the project **{{project_name}}**.
permission.revoked_team: The permission **{{permission}}** was revoked from the team **{{team}}** for the global scope.
permission.revoked_team_project: The permission **{{permission}}** was revoked from the team **{{team}}** for the project **{{project_name}}**.
permission.preset_used_team: The preset **{{preset}}** was applied to the team **{{team}}** for the global scope. The team now has the following permissions: {{permissions}}
permission.preset_used_team_project: The preset **{{preset}}** was applied to the team **{{team}}** for the project **{{project_name}}**. The team now has the following permissions: {{permissions}}
permission.user_already_has_permission_project: <@{{user_id}}> already has the permission **{{permission}}** for the project **{{project_name}}**.

project.project_name_default_exists: The project name can not be **default**. Please choose another name.
project.project_with_name_already_exists: A project with the name **{{name}}** already exists. Please choose another name.
project.project_created: The project **{{name}}** has been created. You can select it as your active project by using the "/project select" command, or by clicking the button below.
project.project_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the project **{{name}}** and all of its tasks? When you move a project to the bin, you have {{days}} days to restore it. After that, it will be permanently deleted.
project.deleted_ephemeral_message: The project **{{project_name}}** was marked as deleted. It will be permanently deleted in {{days}} days. If you want to restore it, use the command "/project restore".
project.deleted_immediate_ephemeral_message: The project **{{project_name}}** and all of its [tasks](<https://bnder.net/help/tasks>), [topics](<https://bnder.net/help/topics>) and [documents](<https://bnder.net/help/documents>) were deleted.
project.project_not_found: The project **{{name}}** could not be found. Use "/project list" to list all existing projects or click the button below to create a new project with this name.
project.project_not_deleted: The project **{{name}}** is not marked as deleted.
project.project_restored: The project **{{name}}** was restored and will not be deleted anymore.
project.project_marked_deleted: The project **{{name}}** is marked as deleted. Restore it with the command "/project restore".
project.project_name_default_cant_deleted: The project **{{name}}** can not be deleted, because it is the default project. You can rename it with the command "/project rename".
project.project_selected: The project **{{name}}** has been selected. Every command will now be executed on this project, if no other project is specified in the command. To switch to another project, use the command "/project select".
project.project_name_default_cant_renamed: The project **default** can not be renamed, because it is the default project.
project.project_name_too_long: اسم المشروع طويل جداً من فضلك قلّصها إلى شخصيات {{max}}.
project.project_limit_reached:
You're growing fast! 🚀
You've reached your workspace limit of {{max}} projects. [Upgrade to Starter or Pro](<https://bnder.net/p/{{guildId}}>) to create more projects and unlock higher limits. Learn more about Starter and Pro plans at https://bnder.net/pricing.
project.project_delete_could_not_send_message: The project **{{project_name}}** and all tasks on the project have been marked as deleted and will be deleted in {{days}} days. A confirmation message could not be sent by the bot due to lack of Discord permission.
project.project_delete_immediate_could_not_send_: The project **{{project_name}}** and all tasks on the project have been deleted. A confirmation message could not be sent by the bot due to lack of Discord permission.
project.edit_cant_choose_name_default: You can't rename a project to **default**, as it is reserved for the default project. Please choose another name.
project.manager_set: The project manager for the project **{{project}}** has been set to <@{{manager}}>.
project.no_manager: The project **{{project}}** has no manager set. Use the command "/project manager" and select a user to set a manager.
project.manager_info: The project manager for the project **{{project}}** is <@{{manager}}>.
project.manager_removed: The project manager for the project **{{project}}** has been removed.
project.columns_link_app: You can configure the columns for all tasks in project **{{name}}** in the [apps project settings](<{{link}}>).

error.unknown: حدث خطأ غير معروف حاول مرة أخرى لاحقاً

task.deleted_ephemeral_message: Task **{{task_id}}** is marked as deleted. It will be permanently deleted in {{days}} days. If you want to restore it, use the command "/task restore".
task.text_too_long: النص طويل جداً من فضلك قلّصها إلى شخصيات {{max}}.
task.task_created: The task has been created with id **{{task_id}}** in the project {{project_name}}. Use "/task info" to see every detail of the task.
task.task_created_no_assignee: The task has been created with id **{{task_id}}** in the project {{project_name}}, but no assignee was set. Use `/task assign` to assign a user or People team to the task.
task.deletion_confirmation: Are you sure you want to move task **{{task_id}}** to the bin (gets deleted after {{delete_in_days}} days)? If you choose to delete the task instantly, the action can not be undone.
task.already_deleted: The task **{{id}}** is already marked as deleted. It will be deleted permanently in {{days}} days. If you want to restore it, use the command "/task restore".
task.task_not_deleted: The task **{{id}}** is not marked as deleted.
task.task_restored: The task **{{id}}** is restored and will not be deleted anymore.
task.task_not_found: The task **{{id}}** could not be found. Use "/task list" to list all tasks assigned to you or "/task project" to list all tasks. You can also create a new task with "/task create".
task.already_assigned_user: The task **{{id}}** is already assigned to <@{{user_id}}>.
task.task_assigned_user: The task **{{id}}** {{title, length100}} was assigned to the user <@{{user_id}}>. It will appear in the task list ("/task list") of this user.
task.task_done: The task **{{id}}** {{title, length100}} is now set to done.

info.more_comments_pro: You can only see the last 3 comments. To see all comments, [please upgrade to a Starter or Pro seat](<https://bnder.net/p/{{guildId}}>). Learn more about paid seats at https://bnder.net/pricing.

todos.text_not_found: The to do text is missing. Please use the "title" parameter to specify the to do text. Please check our [help page](<https://bnder.net/help/tasks#todos>) before you add a to do to learn more about this feature.
todos.added: A to do was added to the task **{{id}}**.
todos.number_not_found: The to do number is missing. Please use the "number" parameter to specify the to do number. Use "/task info" to see the todo numbers of a task. Please check our [help page](<https://bnder.net/help/tasks#todos>) before you remove or complete a to do to learn more about this feature.
todos.number_not_a_number: The to do number must be a positive number. Please use the "number" parameter to specify the to do number. Use "/task info" to see the todo numbers of a task. Please check our [help page](<https://bnder.net/help/tasks#todos>) before you remove or complete a to do to learn more about this feature.
todos.removed: The to do **{{number}}** was removed from the task **{{id}}**.
todos.completed: The to do **{{number}}** for task **{{id}}** was marked as completed.
todos.uncompleted: The to do **{{number}}** for task **{{id}}** was marked as uncompleted.
todos.todo_not_found: The task does not have a todo with the number you specified. The task **{{id}}** has a total amount of {{todos}} todos. Use "/task info" to see the todo numbers of a task. Please check our [help page](<https://bnder.net/help/tasks#todos>) before you remove or complete a to do to learn more about this feature.

task.list_tasks_for_user: # Tasks assigned to <@{{user_id}}> in project **{{project_name}}** ({{count}} tasks):
task.no_tasks_user: There were no tasks found assigned to <@{{user_id}}> in the project **{{project_name}}**. Use `/task project` command to see all tasks of a project.
task.list_tasks_for_user_all_projects: المهام الموكلة إلى شركة " {{user_id}}): " في جميع المشاريع (مهام شركة {{count}}):
task.no_tasks_user_all_projects: There were no tasks found assigned to <@{{user_id}}> in any project. Use `/task project` command to see all tasks of a project.
task.no_tasks_project: There were no tasks found for the project **{{project_name}}**.
task.task_already_done: The task **{{id}}** is already marked as done.
task.now_in_progress: The task **{{id}}** {{title, length100}} is now set to in progress.
task.now_todo: The task **{{id}}** {{title, length100}} is now set to to do.
task.not_assigned_user: The task **{{id}}** is not assigned to <@{{user_id}}>.
task.task_unassigned_user: The task **{{id}}** is no longer assigned to the user <@{{user}}>.
task.task_already_to_do: The task **{{id}}** is already marked as to do.
task.task_moved: The task **{{id}}** has been moved to the project **{{project_name}}**.
task.max_tasks_reached: You can't create more tasks than {{max}} in your server. Please delete some tasks in order to create more.
task.max_assignees_reached: You can’t assign more than {{max}} people to a task. Please unassign someone first.
task.task_assigned_dm: You got assigned to the task [**{{id}}**](<https://bnder.net/t/{{guildId}}/{{id}}>) with deadline set to {{deadline}}: {{text}}
task.deadline_set:
The deadline for the task **{{id}}** has been set to {{- deadline}}. If you want to see the deadline in your calendar, check out our [Calendar Manager Bot](<https://bnder.net/calendar>).
-# All dates are calculated in {{timezone}}. Use "/settings timezone" to change the timezone for the whole server, or "/preferences timezone" to change your own.
task.deadline_removed: The deadline of task **{{id}}** was removed.
task.task_delete_could_not_send_message:
The task **{{id}}** has been marked as deleted and will be deleted in {{days}} days for good.

⚠️ The bot tried to send a confirmation message visible to all, but was unable to do so due to lack of Discord permissions in this channel. Please grant the bot the Discord permission to send messages.
task.task_delete_instantly_could_not_send_mes:
The task **{{id}}** was deleted.

⚠️ The bot tried to send a confirmation message visible to all, but was unable to do so due to lack of Discord permissions in this channel. Please grant the bot the Discord permission to send messages.
task.invalid_deadline_date:
The input could not be processed to a date. Please use the format **{{format}}** (e.g. {{example_date}}), or use a relative date like **1 week 3 days**. You can configure the date format with the command `/settings dateformat`. [See all supported date formats](<https://bnder.net/help/configuration/dateformats>)
-# All dates are calculated in {{timezone}}. Use "/settings timezone" to change the timezone for the whole server, or "/preferences timezone" to change your own.
task.not_created_deleted_project: The task could not be created because the project **{{name}}** is marked as deleted. Restore the project via "/project restore" or choose a different project.
task.not_moved_deleted_project: The task could not be moved because the project **{{name}}** is marked as deleted. Restore the project via "/project restore" or choose a different project.
task.not_restored_deleted_project: The task **{{id}}** could not be restored because the project **{{name}}** is marked as deleted. Restore the project via "/project restore" or choose a different project.
task.no_tasks_in_all_projects: There are no tasks in any project. Use the command "/task create" to create a new task.
task.repeat_set: The task **{{id}}** will now repeat every {{interval}} {{interval_unit}} starting from {{start_date}} and ending at {{end_date}}. When the task is marked as done, the task will be set back to to do when the next repeating date is reached.
task.repeat_days_out_of_range: The interval must be between {{min}} and {{max}} days.
task.repeat_cleared: The task **{{id}}** will no longer repeat.

history.deadline_set: تم تحديد الموعد النهائي إلى {{deadline}}. كان في السابق {{old_deadline}}.
history.more_entries_available: You can only see the last 3 entries. To see all entries, [please upgrade to a Starter or Pro seat](<https://bnder.net/p/{{guildId}}>). Learn more about paid seats at https://bnder.net/pricing.

task.description_too_long: الوصف طويل جداً من فضلك قلّصها إلى شخصيات {{max}}.
task.comment_text_too_long: نص التعليق طويل جداً من فضلك قلّصها إلى شخصيات {{max}}.
task.task_commented: Your comment was added to the task **{{id}}**. It will be visible in the "/task info" command and in the app.
task.max_amount_of_comments_per_task: You can't add more than {{max}} comments to a task unless you [upgrade to a Starter or Pro seat](<https://bnder.net/p/{{guildId}}>). Learn more about paid seats at https://bnder.net/pricing.
task.task_edited: The task **{{id}}** has been edited. Use "/task info" to see the changes.
task.edit_no_changes: No changes were made to the task **{{id}}**, because you didn't specify any changes.
task.followup_reminder_stopped: The follow-up reminder for task **{{id}}** has been stopped.
task.max_assignees_reached_buy_pro:
Need more hands on deck? 👥
This task already has the maximum **{{max}} assignees**. [Upgrade to a Starter or Pro seat](<https://bnder.net/p/{{guildId}}>) to assign more people and keep your whole team aligned. Learn more about paid seats at https://bnder.net/pricing.
task.daily_repeat_not_allowed: Setting the task repeat interval to less than 7 days is only available to users in pro seats. [Please upgrade to a pro seat](<https://bnder.net/p/{{guildId}}>) to use this feature. Learn more about pro seats at https://bnder.net/pricing.
task.todos_not_allowed:
Boost productivity with Todos! ✅
Todos are a Pro feature that helps you break tasks into actionable steps. Unlock this powerful tool by upgrading to a Pro Seat today! Learn more about pro seats at https://bnder.net/pricing.
task.attachments_storage_limit_reached: You have reached the maximum storage limit for this workspace. To increase the storage limit, [upgrade to Starter or Pro](<https://bnder.net/p/{{guildId}}>). Learn more about Starter and Pro plans at https://bnder.net/pricing.
task.attachment_added: The attachment **{{file_name}}** has been added to the task **{{id}}**. You can view it by using the "/task attachments" command.
task.deadline_extended: The deadline for the task **{{id}}** has been extended to {{deadline}}.
task.attachment_removed: The attachment **{{file_name}}** has been removed from the task **{{id}}**.
task.attachment_remove_error: The attachment **{{file_name}}** could not be removed from the task **{{id}}**. Please try again later.
task.attachment_not_found: The attachment **{{file_name}}** could not be found in the task **{{id}}**. Use "/task info" to see all attachments.
task.no_attachments: There are no attachments for the task **{{id}}**. Use the command "/task attach" to add an attachment to the task.
task.attachment_discord_download_error: لا يمكن تحميل الملحق من التشريد. حاول مرة أخرى لاحقاً
task.attachment_cdn_upload_error: ولا يمكن تحميل الملحق على شبكة المعلومات. حاول مرة أخرى لاحقاً
task.already_subscribed: You are already subscribed to the task **{{id}}**.
task.subscribe_success: You are now subscribed to the task **{{id}}**. You will get notified about every change to this task.
task.not_subscribed: You are not subscribed to the task **{{id}}**. Use "/task subscribe" to subscribe to this task and get notified about changes to it.
task.unsubscribe_success: You are no longer subscribed to the task **{{id}}** and will not get notified about changes to this task.
task.subscribe_not_allowed: Subscribing to tasks is only available to users in Starter or Pro seats. [Please upgrade to a Starter or Pro seat](<https://bnder.net/p/{{guildId}}>) to use this feature. Learn more about paid seats at https://bnder.net/pricing.
task.repeat_set_monthly: The task **{{id}}** {{title, length100}} will now repeat every month at the {{repeat_day_of_month}}., starting from {{start_date}} and ending at {{end_date}}. When the task is marked as done, the task will be set back to to do when the next repeating date is reached.
task.milestone_not_in_project: The milestone **{{name}}** is not in the project **{{project}}**, where the task is in. Use "/milestone list" to list all milestones in the project or "/milestone create" to create a new one.
task.milestone_not_set: Could not remove the milestone from the task **{{id}}**, because it is not set.
task.milestone_removed: The milestone was removed from the task **{{id}}**.
task.milestone_updated: The milestone of task **{{id}}** was set to **{{milestone}}**.
task.deadline_not_set: There is no deadline set for the task **{{id}}**. Use "/task deadline" to set a deadline by providing it in the command.
task.dependencies_not_completed: Are you sure you want to change the state of the task **{{id}}**? One (task {{dependencyId}}) or more dependencies are not completed yet.
task.dependencies_not_allowed: Dependencies are only available to users in pro seats. [Please upgrade to a pro seat](<https://bnder.net/p/{{guildId}}>) to use this feature. Learn more about pro seats at https://bnder.net/pricing.
task.dependencies_cannot_be_same: المهمة لا يمكن أن تعتمد على نفسها. يرجى اختيار مهمة أخرى كتبعية.
task.dependencies_already_exists: The task **{{id}}** is already dependent on the task **{{dependencyId}}**. Use "/task dependencies remove" to remove the dependency.
task.dependencies_added: Task **{{dependencyId}}** was added as a dependency to task **{{id}}**. When task **{{id}}** changes its state, before task **{{dependencyId}}** is completed, a warning will be shown.
task.dependencies_not_found: The task **{{dependencyId}}** is not a dependency of the task **{{id}}**. Use "/task dependencies add" to add it as a dependency.
task.dependencies_removed: The dependency to task **{{dependencyId}}** was removed from task **{{id}}**.
task.relations_cannot_be_same: المهمة لا يمكن أن تكون مرتبطة بنفسها يرجى اختيار مهمة أخرى.
task.relations_already_exists: Task **{{id}}** already has a **{{relationshipType}}** relationship to task **{{relatedTaskId}}**. Use "/task relations remove" to remove it first.
task.relations_added: Task **{{relatedTaskId}}** was added as a **{{relationshipType}}** relationship on task **{{id}}**.
task.relations_not_found: Task **{{id}}** does not have a **{{relationshipType}}** relationship to task **{{relatedTaskId}}**.
task.relations_removed: Task **{{relatedTaskId}}** was removed from the **{{relationshipType}}** relationships on task **{{id}}**.
task.relations_duplicate_of_exists: Task **{{id}}** already points to task **{{relatedTaskId}}** as its canonical duplicate target. Remove that relationship first before setting another duplicate target.
task.new_command_status_notice: -# This functionality has been replaced by the new command "/task status". Please use this command to change the status of a task.
task.status_changed: The status of the task **{{id}}** {{title, length100}} has been changed to **{{status}}**.
task.invalid_status: The status **{{status}}** is invalid. Please use one of the following: {{statuses}}

custom_fields.requires_file_fields_create: This project requires app-only task fields ({{field_names}}). يرجى الانتهاء من إنشاء المهمة في التطبيق.
custom_fields.no_editable_fields: مشروع هذه المهمة ليس له حقول تقليدية يمكن تحريرها في فضول
custom_fields.requires_file_fields_edit: ولا تزال هذه المهمة تتطلب مجالات عمل فقط ({{field_names}}). من فضلك أنهي هذا التطبيق
custom_fields.form_invalid: الشكل الميداني للمهمة غير صحيح من فضلك ابدأ من جديد
custom_fields.form_expired: وقد انتهت صلاحية هذا النموذج الميداني للمهام. من فضلك ابدأ من جديد
custom_fields.all_collected: وقد تم بالفعل جمع جميع مجالات العمل المعتادة.
custom_fields.progress_saved: ميادين العمل المنقذة {{current}} / {{total}}. تابعي الحقول التالية
custom_fields.create_draft_invalid: The task draft is invalid. Please run /task create again.
custom_fields.edit_draft_invalid: The task field draft is invalid. Please run /task fields again.
custom_fields.validation_number: Task field '{{field_name}}' must be a number.
custom_fields.validation_email: Task field '{{field_name}}' must be a valid email.
custom_fields.validation_date: Task field '{{field_name}}' must be a valid date.
custom_fields.validation_boolean: Task field '{{field_name}}' must be true or false.
custom_fields.validation_single_select: Task field '{{field_name}}' must use one of: {{option_names}}
custom_fields.validation_multi_select: Task field '{{field_name}}' must use valid options: {{option_names}}
custom_fields.validation_file: Task field '{{field_name}}' requires app-only input and is not supported in Discord.

task.one_assignee_target_required: اختر إما مستعمل أو فريق، وليس كلاهما.
task.team_not_found: Team **{{team}}** was not found. Choose one of the autocomplete suggestions.
task.already_assigned_team: The task **{{id}}** is already assigned to the team **{{team}}**.
task.not_assigned_team: The task **{{id}}** is not assigned to the team **{{team}}**.
task.task_assigned_team: The task **{{id}}** {{title, length100}} was assigned to the team **{{team}}**. It will appear in the task list of active team members.
task.task_unassigned_team: The team **{{team}}** was unassigned from task **{{id}}**.

milestone.not_found: The milestone **{{name}}** could not be found. Use "/milestone list" to list all milestones.
milestone.already_exists: A milestone with the name **{{name}}** already exists.
milestone.max_milestones_reached:
Keep your momentum going! 🚀
You've reached the limit of **{{max}} milestones** for your workspace. [Upgrade to Starter or Pro](<https://bnder.net/p/{{guildId}}>) to track more milestones and keep your projects moving forward. Learn more about Starter and Pro plans at https://bnder.net/pricing.
milestone.due_date_invalid: The due date is invalid. Please use the format **{{format}}** (e.g. {{example_date}}), or use a relative date like **1 week 3 days**. You can configure the date format with the command `/settings dateformat`.
milestone.milestone_created: The milestone **{{name}}** has been created in the project {{project}}.
milestone.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the milestone **{{name}}**?
milestone.no_changes: No changes were made to the milestone **{{name}}**.
milestone.list_no_milestones: There are no milestones in the project **{{project}}**. Use the command "/milestone create" to create a new milestone.

topic.not_found: The selected topic was not found. Use "/topic list" to list all available topics or create a new one with "/topic create".
topic.selected: The document **{{id}}** has been moved to the topic **{{topic}}**.
topic.name_too_long: اسم الموضوع طويل جداً من فضلك قلّصها إلى شخصيات {{max}}.
topic.already_exists: A topic with the name **{{name}}** already exists.
topic.too_many_topics:
Stay organized without limits! 📂
You've reached the limit of **{{max}} topics** for organizing your documents. [Upgrade to Starter or Pro](<https://bnder.net/p/{{guildId}}>) to create more topics and keep everything structured your way. Learn more about Starter and Pro plans at https://bnder.net/pricing.
topic.created: The topic **{{name}}** has been created inside project {{project}}.
topic.renamed: The topic **{{old_name}}** has been renamed to **{{new_name}}**.
topic.no_topics: There are no topics. Use the command "/topic create" to create a new topic.
topic.delete_confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete the topic **{{name}}**? Moving it to the bin will not delete it permanently. You can restore it with the command "/topic restore" within {{days}} days. This will also affect {{count}} documents.
topic.not_deleted: The topic **{{name}}** is not in the bin and therefore can't be restored.
topic.restored: The topic **{{name}}** and all documents in it were restored.
topic.deleted: The topic **{{name}}** and all documents in it were deleted.
topic.moved_to_bin_success: The topic **{{name}}** and all documents in it were moved to the bin. They will be deleted permanently in {{days}} days. You can restore them with the command "/topic restore".
topic.already_in_project: The topic **{{name}}** is already in the project **{{project}}**.
topic.moved: The topic **{{name}}** was moved to the project **{{project}}**.

document.freshly_created: The document has been created with id **{{id}}** in the project {{project}}. It is not yet set to a topic. If you want to move it to a topic, select one at the bottom of this message.
document.list_no_documents: There are no documents in any project. Use the command "/document create" to create a new document.
document.list_no_documents_in_project: There are no documents in the project **{{project}}**. Use the command "/document create" to create a new document.
document.not_found: The document with the id **{{id}}** could not be found. Use "/document list" to list all documents.
document.delete_confirmation:
Are you sure you want to delete the document **{{title}}**?

Moving the document to the bin will not delete it permanently. You can restore it with the command "/document restore" within {{days}} days.
document.moved_to_bin_success: The document **{{title}}** has been moved to the bin. It will be deleted permanently in {{days}} days. You can restore it with the command "/document restore".
document.not_delete: The document **{{title}}** is not in the bin and therefore can't be restored.
document.restored: The document **{{title}}** was removed out of the bin.
document.too_many_in_project: You can only have **{{max}}** documents in your server. Please delete one document before creating a new one.
document.topic_changed: The document was moved to the topic **{{topic}}**.

generated_by_other_bot_notice: i. This message was generated by @{{bot_id}}..
specified_object_is_document: الهوية التي أعطيتها هي نسخة من وثيقة To access the document functionity use the Document Manager Bot. وإلا تحدد هوية أخرى تنتمي إلى مهمة أو حدث.
specified_object_is_task: الذرة التي أعطيتها هي المهمة To access the document functionity use the Task Manager Bot. وإلا تحدد هوية أخرى تعود إلى وثيقة أو حدث.
specified_object_is_event: الحشيش الذي أعطيته هو يوم الحدث للحصول على وظيفة الحدث استخدم المدير (بوت) وإلا تحدد هوية أخرى تنتمي إلى مهمة أو وثيقة.
object_not_found: The object with the id **{{id}}** could not be found. You can use `/task project`, `/document list` or `/event list` to list all objects across our services.
invalid_id_format: The entered id is invalid. Ids for [tasks](<https://bnder.net/help/tasks>), [documents](<https://bnder.net/help/documents>) and [events](<https://bnder.net/help/events>) should contain only numbers.

label.name_too_long: اسم الوسم طويل جداً من فضلك قلّصها إلى شخصيات {{max}}.
label.max_amount_of_labels_reached:
You're running out of label space! 🏷️
You've reached the limit of **{{max}} total labels** in your workspace. [Upgrade to Starter or Pro](<https://bnder.net/p/{{guildId}}>) to unlock more labels and keep your workflow organized. Learn more about Starter and Pro plans at https://bnder.net/pricing.
label.already_exists: A label with the name **{{name}}** already exists.
label.color_not_supported: The color **{{color}}** is not supported. Please use one of the following: {{colors}}
label.created: The label **{{name}}** has been created. You can now add it to [tasks](<https://bnder.net/task>) and [documents](<https://bnder.net/knowledge>) with the command "/label add".
label.not_found: The label **{{name}}** could not be found. Use "/label list" to list all labels or create a new one with "/label create".
label.too_many_labels: The object already has the maximum number of labels ({{max}}). To add another label, [please upgrade to Starter or Pro](<https://bnder.net/p/{{guildId}}>). Learn more about Starter and Pro plans at https://bnder.net/pricing.
label.already_added: The label **{{name}}** is already added to the object.
label.added_to_task: The label **{{name}}** has been added to the task **{{id}}**.
label.added_to_document: The label **{{name}}** has been added to the document **{{id}}**.
label.deleted: The label **{{name}}** has been deleted and removed from all [tasks](<https://bnder.net/task>) and [documents](<https://bnder.net/knowledge>).
label.no_labels: There are no labels. Use the command "/label create" to create a new label.
label.not_added: The label **{{name}}** is not on the object. Use "/label add" to add it.
label.removed_from_task: The label **{{name}}** has been removed from the task **{{id}}**.
label.removed_from_document: The label **{{name}}** has been removed from the document **{{id}}**.
label.description_too_long: وصف الوسم طويل جداً من فضلك قلّصها إلى شخصيات {{max}}.

logging_webhook.invalid_url: The entered webhook url is invalid. Please enter a valid Discord webhook url, starting in a valid url format (https://...).
logging_webhook.url_set_non_discord_url: لقد تم تحديد موقع (ويهوك) لكن لا يبدو أنه (أورل) إذا كنت ترغب في تلقي رسائل تسجيل في قناة فض الاشتباك الخاصة بك، يرجى وضع علامة النسيج على شبكة الإنترنت الصحيح، تجاهل هذه الرسالة.
logging_webhook.url_set: The Webhook URL has been set. A test message has been sent, check your Discord channel to see if it worked. Otherwise, check our help page at https://bnder.net/help/advanced/logging for more information.
logging_webhook.url_removed: وقد تم إزالة موقع ويهوك وقطع الأشجار أصبح الآن معوقا.
logging_webhook.test_description: هذه رسالة اختبار للتحقق إذا كان (ويهوك) صالحاً إذا رأيت هذه الرسالة، كل شيء يعمل بشكل جيد.

هل أنت متأكد من أنك تريد إزالة الـ(ويهوك أورل)؟ سيتم تعطيل المكان

للتمكين من قطع الأشجار، وضع اليورل كخيار للقيادة.
logging_webhook.url_not_set: لا يوجد (ويهوك أورل) جاهز رجاءً ضعي جهاز "ويهوك أورل" لتلقي رسائل تسجيل تعلم المزيد عن طريق الضغط على الزر

auto_labeling.enabled: Auto labeling is now enabled. To create a new label, use the command "/label create". To learn more about auto labeling, visit https://bnder.net/help/labels.
auto_labeling.already_enabled: Auto labeling is already enabled. To create a new label, use the command "/label create". To learn more about auto labeling, visit https://bnder.net/help/labels.
auto_labeling.already_disabled: Auto labeling is already disabled. To create a new label, use the command "/label create". To learn more about auto labeling, visit https://bnder.net/help/labels.

timezone.timezone_not_found: The timezone **{{timezone}}** could not be found. Please use a valid timezone name from the list at https://bnder.net/help/configuration/timezones.
timezone.timezone_set: The timezone has been set to **{{timezone}}**. The current date and time in **{{timezone}}** is **{{date}}**.

dateformat.not_supported: The date format **{{format}}** is not supported. Please use one of the following: {{supported}}
dateformat.set: The date format has been set to **{{format}}**.

private_responses.enabled: ويجري الآن تمكين الاستجابات الخاصة. ولن تُعرض على الجميع بعض الرسائل، إن لم يحدد خلاف ذلك عن طريق خيار القيادة.
private_responses.disabled: الاستجابات الخاصة معوقة الآن. كل الرسائل ستظهر للجميع
private_responses.already_enabled: وقد تم بالفعل تمكين الاستجابات الخاصة. ولن تُعرض على الجميع بعض الرسائل، إن لم يحدد خلاف ذلك عن طريق خيار القيادة.
private_responses.already_disabled: الاستجابات الخاصة معوقة بالفعل. كل الرسائل ستظهر للجميع

auto_priority.enabled: تم الآن التمكين من أولوية السيارات. وستحظى المهام الآن تلقائيا بالأولوية على أساس نصها.
auto_priority.already_enabled: وقد تم بالفعل تمكين أولوية التشغيل الآلي. وستحظى المهام الآن تلقائيا بالأولوية على أساس نصها.
auto_priority.already_disabled: الأولوية الأوتوماتيكية معوقة بالفعل. ولن تحصل المهام تلقائيا على أولوية استنادا إلى نصها.

user_languages.enabled: Users can now set their own language using "/preferences language". This will make the respond to them in their configured language.
user_languages.disabled: Users can no longer set their own language. The bot will use the configured server language. You can change the language via "/settings language".
user_languages.already_enabled: User languages are already enabled. You can change your language via "/preferences language".
user_languages.already_disabled: User languages are already disabled. The bot will use the configured server language. You can change the language via "/settings language".

default_assignee.success: وقد تغير المحال إليه غير المحال إليه لأداء مهام جديدة.

week_start_day.set: The week start day has been set to **{{day}}**.

user_timezones.enabled: Users can now set their own timezone using "/preferences timezone". This will make the bot respond to them in their configured timezone.
user_timezones.disabled: Users can no longer set their own timezone. The bot will use the configured server timezone. You can change the timezone via "/settings timezone".
user_timezones.already_enabled: User timezones are already enabled. You can change your timezone via "/preferences timezone".
user_timezones.already_disabled: User timezones are already disabled. The bot will use the configured server timezone. You can change the timezone via "/settings timezone".

private_messages.enabled: وتتاح الآن رسائل خاصة. ويتلقى المستعملون إخطارا عن طريق رسالة مباشرة عندما يكلفون بمهمة.
private_messages.disabled: الرسائل الخاصة معطلة الآن ولن يتلقى المستعملون إخطارا عن طريق رسالة مباشرة عندما يكلفون بمهمة.
private_messages.already_enabled: وتم بالفعل تمكين الرسائل الخاصة. ويتلقى المستعملون إخطارا عن طريق رسالة مباشرة عندما يكلفون بمهمة.
private_messages.already_disabled: الرسائل الخاصة معطلة بالفعل ولن يتلقى المستعملون إخطارا عن طريق رسالة مباشرة عندما يكلفون بمهمة.

loglevel.changed_but_no_webhook: The default log level for new logging webhook endpoints has been changed, but no webhook endpoint is configured yet. Add one with `/settings logging action:add` to receive log messages. Learn more by pressing the button below.
loglevel.changed_to_everything: The default log level for new logging webhook endpoints has been changed to everything. Existing endpoints keep their own log level; update them with `/settings logging action:update`.
loglevel.changed_to_create_delete: The default log level for new logging webhook endpoints has been changed to create and delete. Existing endpoints keep their own log level; update them with `/settings logging action:update`.
loglevel.changed_to_permissions_only: The default log level for new logging webhook endpoints has been changed to permissions only. Existing endpoints keep their own log level; update them with `/settings logging action:update`.

task_cleanup_policy.disabled: The task cleanup policy has been disabled. ولن تحذف المهام تلقائيا.
task_cleanup_policy.enabled: وتم تمكين سياسة تنظيف المهام. وستُحذف المهام تلقائياً بعد أيام عمل {{days}} دون تغيير.

holidays.enabled: Holiday calendars are enabled for **{{location}}**. Active types: {{types}}.
holidays.disabled: Holiday calendars are disabled. The saved location is **{{location}}** and active types are {{types}} for the next time you enable them.
holidays.country_required: Please provide a country code, for example `DE` or `US`, when enabling holiday calendars for the first time.
holidays.invalid_types: نوع أو أكثر من العطلات غير صالحة. استخدام أي من: عامة، مصرف، مدرسة، احتفال، ديني، شركة، عرف.

language.language_changed: The language has been changed. This only affects you, not the whole server. The language for the server can be changed with the command "/settings language".
language.language_changed_but_disabled_by_server: لغتك تغيّرت، لكن الخادم عطل الخيار لوضع لغتك الخاصة. ستستخدم لغة الخادم

timezone.timezone_set: Your personal timezone has been set to **{{timezone}}**. This only affects you, not the whole server. The server timezone can be changed with the command "/settings timezone".
timezone.timezone_set_but_disabled_by_server: Your personal timezone has been set to **{{timezone}}**, but the server has disabled the option to set your own timezone. The server timezone will be used (currently **{{server_timezone}}**).

event_reminders.enabled: ويمكن الآن تقديم رسائل تذكيرية للحدث. سوف تحصل على تذكير حتى 30 دقيقة قبل بدء الحدث.

direct_messages.enabled: وتتاح الآن رسائل مباشرة. ستتلقى رسالة مباشرة عندما يتم تعيينك في مهمة
direct_messages.disabled: الرسائل المباشرة معطلة الآن لن تحصل على رسالة مباشرة عندما يتم تعيينك في مهمة
direct_messages.enabled_but_disabled_by_server: الرسائل المباشرة مُتاحة في أفضلياتك، لكنّها مُعاقة بواسطة الخادم. لن تحصل على رسالة مباشرة عندما يتم تعيينك في مهمة أو لتذكر الأحداث.

holidays.enabled: Your personal holiday region is enabled for **{{location}}**.
holidays.disabled: Your personal holiday region is disabled. The saved location is **{{location}}** for the next time you enable it.
holidays.country_required: Please provide a country code, for example `DE` or `US`, when enabling your personal holiday region for the first time.

vacation.enabled: Your vacation replacement is set: **{{replacement}}** covers new work from **{{startDate}}** to **{{endDate}}**.
vacation.cleared: استبدال العطلة الخاص بك تم تطهير.
vacation.invalid_date: Use valid dates in `YYYY-MM-DD` format, and make sure the end date is not before the start date.
vacation.self_replacement: اختر عضو آخر في مجال العمل كبديل لك

vacation.people_unavailable: إدارة الناس غير متاحة في هذا المجال.

event.not_found: The event with the id **{{id}}** could not be found. Use "/event list" to list all events or create a new one with "/event create".
event.invalid_date:
The input could not be processed to a date. Please use the format **{{format}}** (e.g. {{example_date}}), or use a relative date like **1 week 3 days**. You can configure the date format with the command `/settings dateformat`. [See all supported date formats](<https://bnder.net/help/configuration/dateformats>)
-# All dates are calculated in {{timezone}}. Use "/settings timezone" to change the timezone for the whole server, or "/preferences timezone" to change your own.
event.start_after_end: يجب أن يكون موعد البدء قبل الموعد النهائي.
event.created:
The event **{{name}}** has been created with id **{{id}}** from {{start}} to {{end}}. Use "/event invite" to invite others to this event.
-# All dates are calculated in {{timezone}}. Use "/settings timezone" to change the timezone for the whole server, or "/preferences timezone" to change your own.
event.accept_not_invited: The event **{{id}}** could not be accepted because you are not invited. Use "/event list" to list all events or create a new one with "/event create".
event.not_invited: You are not invited to the event **{{id}}**. If you are the creator, use "/event delete" to delete the event.
event.accepted:
You have accepted the invitation to the event **{{id}}** {{title}} from {{start}} to {{end}}.
-# All dates are calculated in {{timezone}}. Use "/settings timezone" to change the timezone for the whole server, or "/preferences timezone" to change your own.
event.accept_dm:
<@{{invitee}}> has accepted your invitation to the event **{{id}}** {{title}} from {{start}} to {{end}}.
-# All dates are calculated in {{timezone}}. Use "/settings timezone" to change the timezone for the whole server, or "/preferences timezone" to change your own.
event.delete_creator_error: لا يمكنك أن تحذف حدثاً أنت لست مخترعه
event.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the event **{{id}}**?
event.invite_denied: You have denied the invitation to the event **{{id}}**.
event.deny_dm: <@{{invitee}}> has denied your invitation to the event **{{id}}**.
event.invite_creator_error: You can't invite users to an event you are not the creator of. Use "/event list" to list all events or create a new one with "/event create".
event.invite_self_creator_error: لا يمكنك دعوة نفسك إلى حدث أنت صانعه اختر مستعملاً آخر ليدعو إلى الحدث
event.invite_already_invited: The user <@{{user}}> is already invited to the event **{{id}}**.
event.invite_limit_reached:
Meeting full! 👥
You've reached the limit of **{{max}} participants** for this meeting. [Upgrade to Starter or Pro](<https://bnder.net/p/{{guildId}}>) to invite more people and keep everyone in the loop. Learn more about Starter and Pro plans at https://bnder.net/pricing.
event.invite_success: The user <@{{user}}> has been invited to the event **{{id}}**.
event.already_accepted: You have already accepted the invitation to the event **{{id}}**.
event.already_denied: You have already denied the invitation to the event **{{id}}**.
event.deleted: The event **{{name}}** with id {{id}} has been deleted.
event.remove_creator_error: لا يمكنك إزالة المستخدمين من حدث أنت لست مخترعه
event.remove_self_creator_error: You can't remove yourself from an event you are the creator of. Use "/event delete" to delete the event.
event.remove_not_invited_error: The user <@{{user}}> is not invited to the event **{{id}}**.
event.remove_success: The user <@{{user}}> has been removed from the event **{{id}}**.
event.create_public_key: هل أنت متأكد أنك تريد تصدير تقويمك؟ هذا سيولد حلقة فريدة يمكن استخدامها للوصول إلى أحداثك من هذا الخادم أي شخص لديه الرابط سيكون قادرا على رؤية أحداثك اضغط على الزر لتأكيده
event.public_key:
You can access your calendar and integrate it in your preferred calendar app with the following link: <{{url}}>

Please note the following:
- Anyone with the link will be able to see your events
- It will only show events from one week ago or 4 weeks into the future when it is synced with your calendar app
- You can regenerate the link at any time to make the old link invalid
event.regenerate_key: هل أنت متأكد من أنك تريد تجديد وصلتك التقويمية؟ الرابط القديم سيكون غير صحيح ولا يمكن استخدامه للوصول إلى أحداثك بعد الآن اضغط على الزر لتأكيده
event.repeat_end_before_start: ويجب أن يكون تاريخ نهاية التكرار بعد تاريخ البدء.
event.repeat_end_too_far: ويجب أن يكون تاريخ نهاية التكرار في غضون سنة واحدة من الآن.
event.max_events_reached: You have reached the maximum amount ({{max}}) of events for your guild. Please delete some events in order to create more.
event.remove_dm: You have been removed from the event **{{id}}**: {{name}}.
event.daily_repeating_not_allowed: Daily repeating events are only available to users in pro seats. [Please upgrade to a pro seat](<https://bnder.net/p/{{guildId}}>) to use this feature. Learn more about pro seats at https://bnder.net/pricing.
event.repeat_end_not_allowed: Setting a repeat end date is only available to users in pro seats. [Please upgrade to a pro seat](<https://bnder.net/p/{{guildId}}>) to use this feature. Learn more about pro seats at https://bnder.net/pricing.
event.edited:
The event **{{id}}** has been edited with title **{{name}}** from {{start}} to {{end}}.
-# All dates are calculated in {{timezone}}. Use "/settings timezone" to change the timezone for the whole server, or "/preferences timezone" to change your own.
event.edit_no_changes: No changes were made to event **{{id}}**. Please specify a new name, start or end time in the command to make changes to this event.
event.edit_creator_error: فقط المُبدِع يُمْكِنُ أَنْ يَجْعلَ تغييراتَ إلى حدثِ!
event.used_timezone_notice: All dates are calculated in {{timezone}}. Use "/settings timezone" to change the timezone for the whole server, or "/preferences timezone" to change your own.

holidays.invalid_range: Please enter dates in `YYYY-MM-DD` format and make sure `from` is not after `to`.
holidays.disabled: Holiday calendars are not enabled for this selection. Use `/settings holidays` for the workspace or `/preferences holidays` for your personal region.
holidays.empty: No holidays were found from **{{from}}** to **{{to}}** for **{{location}}**.

setup.step_language:
## Step 1/{{steps}}: Language

Please select the language you want to use for the bot. This can be changed at every time with the command "/settings language".
setup.step_dateformat:
## Step 2/{{steps}}: Date format

Please select the date format you want to use for the bot. This can be changed at every time with the command "/settings dateformat".
setup.step_timezone_country:
## Step 3/{{steps}}: Timezone

Please select the region you are in to set the correct timezone. Afterwards you can select the exact timezone. This can be changed at every time with the command "/settings timezone".
setup.step_timezone:
## Step 3/{{steps}}: Timezone

Please select the exact timezone you are in. Due to limitations in Discord, not all timezones are shown here. If you can't find your timezone, please use the command "/settings timezone" and skip this step.
setup.step_auto_labeling:
## Step 4/{{steps}}: Auto labeling

Do you want to enable auto labeling? This will automatically add labels to tasks based on their text. This can be changed at every time with the command "/settings auto_labeling".
setup.step_auto_priority:
## Step 5/{{steps}}: Auto priority

Do you want to enable auto priority for users in [pro seats](<https://bnder.net/pricing>)? This will automatically set a priority for tasks based on their text. This can be changed at every time with the command "/settings auto_priority".
setup.step_week_start_day:
## Step 4/{{steps}}: Week start day

Please select the day you want the week to start with. This can be changed at every time with the command "/settings week_start_day".
setup.setup_completed:
The setup has been completed. You can now use the bot. [See here](<https://bnder.net/help?bot={{bot}}>) how to get started. If you want to change the settings, use the command "/settings".

For the complete project management experience, checkout other Bots by bnder: [Task Manager](<https://bnder.net/task>), [Knowledge Manager](<https://bnder.net/knowledge>), [Calendar Manager](<https://bnder.net/calendar>) and [Ticket Manager](<https://bnder.net/tickets>).

**Please note: Removing the bot from the server will delete all settings and data.**

github.already_linked:
Use this url {{url}} to link your GitHub repository with the bot. For further information click the button below.

Set the url as a webhook url in your github repository and select only the push event.
github.not_linked:
حالياً ليس هناك اورل مُولّد لربط مستودعك لـ (جيت هوب) مع المضرب اضغط الزر تحت لتوليد واحد

دمج (غيثوب) يسمح لكِ بربط المهام بذكر المهمة مع (ب)) في رسالة الالتزام وللحصول على مزيد من المعلومات نقر الزر الوارد أدناه.

gitlab.already_linked:
Use this url {{url}} to link your GitLab repository with the bot. For further information click the button below.

Set the url as a webhook url in your gitlab repository and select only the push event.
gitlab.not_linked:
حالياً لا يوجد اورل مُولّد لربط مستودعك لـ (جيت لاب) مع المضرب اضغط الزر تحت لتوليد واحد

دمج الغيتلاب يسمح لك بالربط بين المهام بذكر المهمة مع "#" في رسالة الالتزام وللحصول على مزيد من المعلومات نقر الزر الوارد أدناه.

grant_pro_seat.no_pro_seats_available: This workspace doesn’t have any paid seats yet. [Upgrade to Starter or Pro](<https://bnder.net/p/{{guildId}}>). Workspace admins can pool seats from multiple payers. Learn more about paid seats at https://bnder.net/pricing.
grant_pro_seat.user_already_has_pro_seat: The user @{{userId}}. has already has a paid seat in this workspace.
grant_pro_seat.not_enough_pro_seats: This workspace doesn’t have any unassigned paid seats available for <@{{userId}}>. Free up a paid seat or [buy more seats](<https://bnder.net/p/{{guildId}}>). Workspace admins can assign pooled seats from any payer. Learn more about paid seats at https://bnder.net/pricing.
grant_pro_seat.pro_seat_granted: The user @{{userId}}. has been assigned a paid seat in this workspace. They now have access to the features included in their assigned Starter or Pro seat.

ticket.project_not_found: The project **{{project}}** could not be found. Use an existing project name or leave the project option empty to use your selected project.
